title: BEST Health Insurance Policy - Ultimate Guide
description:

👉VIDEO INTRODUCTION:

Health insurance is sold as financial security. But most people discover the truth only during a claim.

In this episode, Pawan Rai, Co-founder of Ditto Insurance, breaks down how medical insurance is mis-sold, what really decides claim success, and what buyers should actually focus on.
